two_layer_model.host_layer: A supported CLI host runs the shared Scafforge package or local bin wrapper.
two_layer_model.generated_runtime_layer: Scafforge outputs an OpenCode-oriented repo runtime for post-scaffold work.

notes: package.json is configured for public npm publication with publishConfig.access set to public
install from npm after a release, or use a local checkout / direct bin wrapper before release

render-full.description: Render the full scaffold into a destination repo

render-opencode.description: Render only the OpenCode layer into an existing repo

provider_model_contract.model_provider: required provider label for the scaffold run
provider_model_contract.utility_model: optional helper/docs/QA model string; defaults to planner model in render-full when omitted

install_flow: Install and authenticate GitHub Copilot CLI using its own setup flow
Install @scafforge/core from npm after release, or from a local Scafforge checkout before release
github-copilot-cli.handoff: After scaffolding, continue in the generated OpenCode-oriented repo runtime documented in adapters/opencode-runtime.md

install_flow: Install and authenticate Codex using its own setup flow
Install @scafforge/core from npm after release, or from a local Scafforge checkout before release
codex.handoff: After scaffolding, continue in the generated OpenCode-oriented repo runtime documented in adapters/opencode-runtime.md

install_flow: Install and authenticate Claude Code or Claude CLI using its own setup flow
Install @scafforge/core from npm after release, or from a local Scafforge checkout before release
claude-code.handoff: After scaffolding, continue in the generated OpenCode-oriented repo runtime documented in adapters/opencode-runtime.md

responsibilities: open the generated repo after scaffold completion
follow START-HERE.md for full scaffolds or the injected .opencode layer for retrofits
run the project workflow inside OpenCode rather than re-invoking Scafforge as a host adapter
